title: Midnight Glassy Jelly Paella
description: A nutty and glassy-jelly Filipino-inspired dish, served in a paella pan.

ingredients.name: paella pan
ingredients.notes: cookware used for cooking the paella

},{.name: fish sauce
},{.notes: original substitute for h.p. sauce, traditional option

instructions: Heat the paella pan over medium heat.
Add the frying oil and sauté the garlic until fragrant.
Add the mixed mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the chicken broth, water, and saffron rice to the pan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 18 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and fluffy.
Stir in the h.p. sauce, tempering-chocolate, coconut milk, and fish sauce.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with chopped green onions and a squeeze of fresh lime juice.
Let the paella rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
Slice the paella into wedges and serve immediately.
